rules.rule_text:
rule Stealerium
{
	meta:
		author = "MalBeacon"
		description = "Stealerium system information file"
		reference = "https://github.com/MalBeacon/what-is-this-stealer"

	strings:
		$x1 = "[IP]" ascii
		$x2 = "[Machine]" ascii
		$x3 = "[Virtualization]" ascii
		$x4 = "VirtualMachine:" ascii
		$x5 = "BATTERY:" ascii
		$x6 = "WEBCAMS COUNT:" ascii

	condition:
		all of them
}
